name: Acapulco Chicken, Mona Geary
recipeIngredient: 12 Whole Corn Tortillas Cut Into 2-inch Squares
1.5 Cans Cream Of Chicken Soup, Undiluted
1.5 Cans Cream Of Chicken Soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tortillas into 2-inch squares and place them at the bottom of a large, well-greased casserole dish.
2. Mix all ingredients except chicken soup and cheese in a bowl.
3. Cover the chicken mixture with chicken soup.
4. Refrigerate for 24 hours.
5. Top with cheese and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
